reasonings: A multi-device Bluetooth keyboard explicitly designed for pairing with tablets, phones, and computers.
SANWA multi-device Bluetooth keyboard supporting multiple platforms with built-in stand.
Logitech K380 is a well-known multi-device Bluetooth keyboard (bundled with a mouse).
This is a silicone cover accessory for the K380 keyboard, not the keyboard itself.
Multi-device Bluetooth keyboard combo explicitly supports pairing with up to 3 devices across OS platforms.
Explicitly labeled multi-device Bluetooth keyboard with multi-device link/switching feature.
Macally keyboard advertised as multi-device compatible Bluetooth keyboard for phones/tablets.

This is multi-device but combines 2.4G and Bluetooth dual mode, marketed for PC/laptop use rather than phone/tablet, still a multi-device keyboard so fits reasonably well but less focused on Bluetooth-only multi-pairing across mobile devices.
This is a protective sleeve case for the K380 keyboard, an accessory not the keyboard itself.
Logitech MX Mechanical Mini supports Bluetooth multi-device switching across Mac, Windows, iPad.
Explicitly a multi-device (Bluetooth 4.0+3.0+2.4G) keyboard and mouse combo.
Marketed as wireless multi-device full-sized Bluetooth keyboard for Mac, iOS, iPad OS devices.
Rechargeable multi-device foldable Bluetooth keyboard compatible with multiple platforms.
Seenda backlit multi-device Bluetooth keyboard for Mac/iOS/iPad OS devices.
This is a dual-mode combo supporting only one Bluetooth device plus one 2.4G device simultaneously, not true multi-device Bluetooth pairing across many devices.
This is a Bluetooth mouse, not a keyboard.
Wireless hybrid keyboard with Bluetooth and 2.4G, but not explicitly marketed as multi-device Bluetooth pairing.
This is a Bluetooth mouse, not a keyboard, despite being multi-device.
A gaming mechanical keyboard with Bluetooth/2.4G/USB-C but not clearly marketed for multi-device simultaneous pairing to phones/tablets.
This is a multi-device wireless mouse, not a keyboard.
Portable Bluetooth touchpad keyboard compatible with multiple OS platforms and devices.
Retro keyboard explicitly labeled as multi-device multi-OS Bluetooth keyboard.
AZIO Bluetooth keyboard explicitly supports pairing with up to 6 Bluetooth devices with hot-switch.
Foldable Bluetooth keyboard compatible with multiple OS/devices, functions as multi-device keyboard.
Matias wireless keyboard explicitly supports 4-device Bluetooth sync and switching.
This is a keyboard case/cover for a specific iPad model, an accessory bundling a keyboard rather than a standalone multi-device keyboard.
This is a desktop PC tower, not a keyboard product, despite bundling a wired keyboard.
Mini Bluetooth keyboard with touchpad, but primarily single connection design, not explicitly multi-device pairing focused.
This is a keyboard case/cover accessory for Surface tablets rather than a standalone multi-device Bluetooth keyboard product.
